use_cases: Displaying a list of client messages in a messaging app sidebar
Navigating between conversations in a CRM or support dashboard
Showing recent messages with favoriting capability for quick access
Creating a chat interface sidebar with search functionality
Building a notification center with timestamped message items
ai_summary: A minimalist sidebar component that renders a scrollable list of message cards, each displaying user avatar, name, message preview, and timestamp. Supports click-to-select interaction with active state highlighting and a toggleable star icon for marking favorites. Designed for messaging interfaces, chat clients, and notification panels where users need to browse and organize incoming communications efficiently.
